creator: rafaelespindola@live.com
text:
The Freebsd 9 amd64 is presenting regression problems, the use of Packet
Filter with ALTQ accuses error if used a NIC igb. Already the Freebsd 8.3
works normally.

The error is this:
pfctl: igb0: driver does not support altq

Some data to conference:

Chipset Intel I350-CM2
igb0/igb1 (offboard)
Igb2/igb3 (onboard)

SERVIDOR IBM 7160B2U X3530 M4 XEON E5-2407 QC 2.2GHZ/10MB/1 X 4GB RDIMM

Server IBM: http://download.aldo.com.br/pdfprodutos/Produto24027IdArquivo1358.pdf
